text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day on the way to training, I hear Haru Urara
singing to herself.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Let's go, let's go! You can do it, Urara!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Run fast, run fast! You can win this, Urara!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello, Trainer! It's a cheer song I thought up
for our team!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Did you know baseball teams sing cheer songs to
get pumped up?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I found that out yesterday from a comic I was
reading!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara puffs out her chest with pride. I'm
curious to see what she's come up with so far.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Sure! I'm only half done, though.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Let's go, let's go! You can do it, Urara! ♪ Run
fast, run fast! You can win this, Urara! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yep! Oh, but I can come up with more... Lessee...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Let's go, let's go! Sprint as quick as a cheetah!
Run fast, run fast! Dash away like a bunny!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Stomp, stomp goes the elephant! Roar, roar goes
the bear!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ribbit, ribbit goes the frog! Flap, flap goes the
butterfly!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Now let's dance, all together! Let's have fun, all
together!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
La, la, la! La-dee-da! Bam-bam-crash! Twinkle,
twinkle, spark!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Thank you for listening!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that was super fun! Right, time to teach
everyone the words!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hold on... How'd it go again?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! Oopsie, I totally forgot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, it becomes a thing with the whole
team to improvise cheer songs on the spot, and
<chrname> gets really into it too.
